reviews.title: Average stay at average hotel
reviews.positives: The view from my room was the main thing that made my stay worth while.
reviews.negatives:
Average stay at average hotel. I would not stay here again.

The reception area made the first impression and it was not a bright and welcoming space. All the seats have stains.
I booked a premier double room and the sea view from my room on the 19th floor was honesty excellent.The room itself was okay, it could have been cleaner. The bed was clean and somewhat comfortable, but squeaky. The shower water was never hot, only warm. The plumbing was problematic. The shower floor would flood as the water didn't drain out well while taking a shower. The toilet was blocked. The staff were mostly friendly and helpful At breakfast, bacon was served only on request, after a 10 minute wait. Milk at the coffee station was served cold, coffee was warmed on request. Pool area was nice."Private beach" only has 6 umbrellas and 12 beach chairs, so there were never any open seats available. I opted to rent a beach chair from independent sellers for 100 000vnd.

reviews.title: So so
reviews.text:
Actually, you could book a much better room with this amount of money.  
The soundproofing is terrible—every morning at 6 AM, Vietnamese guests from other rooms were talking loudly in the hallway, and it was clearly audible, really disturbing other guests' rest.  
Additionally, the room's power outlets were faulty, and the water pressure was just average.  
The front desk staff's service could definitely use some improvement.  
On the bright side, the breakfast had a good variety, which was nice.

reviews.title: Worst experienced ever
reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience at this 4.5-star hotel. The room was dirty, and the toilet already had yellow stains when I arrived. The parking lot is extremely small—if you’re driving, think twice before booking. Worst of all, I left behind a bracelet worth around $4,000 and called the hotel three times, but they kept avoiding the issue, promising to call back but never did. Only after I got visibly upset did the receptionist apologize and blamed the chaos on the hotel being busy. Totally unprofessional and unacceptable for a hotel of this rating.

reviews.positives: Location, amenities, breakfast
reviews.negatives: I liked everything

reviews.title: Hotel has a strict 2PM checked in
reviews.text:
Out of all the hundreds of hotels I stay at, liberty Nha Trang the only hotel I come across they strictly will only checked you in after 2pm. You cannot checked in earlier than 2pm. 

I stay at many hotels, 99% of these hotels will checked you in at about 11AM. Do not expect liberty Nha Trang.  

Apart from the early checked in issues, it’s a okay hotel but you should booked the room that allowed you to use the club lounge, it’s totally worth it! I imagine any other room type will be not nice.

You can also catch a bus from airport to stop near liberty hotel cost 50,000 vnd per person

Staff in the executive lounge are very friendly and nice. If you want see nice staff booked room with executive lounge access otherwise the staff on staff the ground floor in the breakfast areas are rude. To me I don’t care as long as my room is clean, of course it’s always a bonus in any hotel to have good customer service

If you want to borrow a towel you must paid 30,000vnd, cheap! Too me I reckon should be complementary

I stay here again because I want executive lounge access, I can’t find any hotels in nha trang offer club lounge access. 

Reception properly about 50% of their staff are very helpful, the other 50% I have no comments

Overall it’s a great hotel for the price!

reviews.title: Exceptional hotel, fantastic! Thank you!
reviews.positives: This was an exceptional hotel, fantastic! Thank you! Everything about this hotel was wonderful, of course including the price which was nicely affordable for me. Great rooms which were comfortable, spacious, and very nicely furnished, very clean, great TV, very nice staff at the desk and cleaning, very nice breakfast, close to the beach. Restaurant in the hotel was also great, for business had very enjoyable lunch and dinner there with good price, better than the single lunch I had outside at a restaurant along the street when I had just arrived and was waiting for check-in and before I knew better. Beach was beautiful and nice ambiance with restaurants and shops on this side of the street. Will definitely try to come here to Nha Trang and this Hotel again. Thank you!

reviews.title: Treated like it was a cash cow business
reviews.text: Good location however staff care level was next to zero, the concierge was non existent, and the room was not clean. It had nail clippings on the chair, food crumbs and stains on the used slippers and the blind in the shower was falling apart and mouldy. reviews.title: This hotel needs lots of improvement
reviews.text: Requested nonsmoking room but was given a room full of smoke.  Front desk personals claimed that it was impossible since floor 15 was nonsmoking. On the other hand, daily room service personels said that anyone can smoke behind close door and it doesn't matter what floor it is.  No other rooms available and was unable to sleep all night. Windows were not designed to be opened so room felt very stuffy and was not able to get rid of smoke plus air conditioner was very difficult to adjust. Thus I smelled like a cigarette along with all my clothes. Room service only took care of bed linens. Bathroom and room were never cleaned. Only gave new towels every other day. Never replaced dirty cups and glasses. Sometimes trash cans were not emptied. Room keys got deactivated at least once everyday required numerous trips to the front desk. Refrigerator was not working even after hotel engineer came for service. Front desk said that they can't exchange US dollar to Vietnamese dollar for hotel patrons because rate went way down??? Say what? Most front desk staff were clueless and not experienced. Some of the explanations of the staff working in this hotel were ridiculous and nonsense. Breakfast was ok and most dishes lack flavors and necessary ingredients. This is a new hotel but appears much older and staff desperately needs a lot of more training.

reviews.text: Even though the hotel advertises free umbrella and benches at the “private beach” on Tran Phu street, this is not entirely true. The first day I arrived at 3. We were informed by some local vendor who has control of the beach that we have to pay to be on the beach after 5 (the coolest time of the day to enjoy the beach because any earlier time would be burning hot). The next day we got there at 3. And yes we got free umbrella and benches but private vendor roam the beach left and right. They come to our bench to offer all kind of stuffs. This poses a serious concern in security, if we leave our belongings unattended we will never see them again. (Vs Havana the beach is fully protected, no street vendors allowed on their beach). I’m also not happy with the fact the the fire arlarm randomly went off at midnight and scared thr heck out of everyone here. At Liberty you just don’t know when a real fire happens.

reviews.title: Dirty room.
reviews.text:
The only positive thing is the location, just a short walk to the beach and surrounded by local restaurants, cafes, convinient stores etc. 

Arriving early in the morning, the sitting area at the lobby was so so hot, no fan no aircon, the lobby was dark, only one little light at one counter was on for the receptionist to do his work.
 
We booked the Signature room. The room looked like in the photo but wasn't well cleaned and quite old. Not that bling bling like in the photo. We found  hairs everywhere on the floor, bed, toilet, sink etc, stains and holes on bed sheets, stains on towels. I took some pictures.  Just too dirty. 

The pool is quite small, 5 people would be too crowded. Eventho the hotel has policy on wearing proper swimming clothes to the pool, there were still some kids jumping in in shorts and t-shirts. Pool is dirty. 
When I was in the pool with my daughter alone, there was a young boy sitting inside the gym and pointing his phone camera to us the whole time. At first I thought he was taking selfies or just scrolling but then he moves his phone toward us as we were moving away from his capture. Only when I stared at him with intention, he drew his camera away. I think he was recording us. Kinda creepy.. 

The receptionist at 10am on our check-in day was quite friendly, she decided to let us check in for free instead of charging an extra fee of 30% hotel fixed price which was 480k as she informed me that that was the hotel's policy. Shout out to her. 
A  plate of fresh fruits with welcome letter was sent to  us shortly after we got the room. That was nice. 

The breakfast was ok, lack of options but enough. 
The elevator was old and shaky. 
We planned to just stay in one hotel for the whole trip but decided to change the hotel after 2 days. Didn't feel good there. It was always very very crowded and noisy at the lobby, lots of people going in and out, felt like  a busy hostel.  With the same or even less price there are much better hotels with much better service. 
I don't recommend.

reviews.title: Hotel starts to run down, lacking of maintenance
reviews.text:
This is my third stays since Library Cebtral Nha Traing opened. The standards of service have dropped, room started to run down and shown lacking of maintenance. 

The roller blind  in the shower room already rusted and mouldy. No hot water from shower tap..

The check in and check out process took about 15min. 

The restaurant for breakfast look like having refugees there,. Majority of their guests are from a nearby Asia big country, who took the whole plates of fruits, nuts and donuts on their table and left nothing behind for other hotel guests. Super massive. 

Hopefully, the management should look at all these issues so that the hotel could maintain a good impression to other guests without compromised by some other “refugees” guests.

There are more new hotels in Nha Trang that offered good service and nearer to the beach too therefore, it is very competitive and I am sure travellers could find a value for money and pleasant accommodation for your stay
Jas - Singapore

reviews.title: Nice facilities but disappointing service
reviews.text:
Stayed there for 2 nights, and have to say this is my least favorite hotel during the two weeks trip in Vietnam although it was also the most expensive one I've stayed.
Location, breakfast, cleanliness and facilities are all worth for money except for the service. They were all smiling, but really distant and never made me feel welcomed. The luggage guy didn't help us with the heavy luggage even we're girls and he was a little aggressive when spoke to us. The hotel wouldn't let us exchange the last day's breakfast to the day we arrived (we arrived at 5am and left at 5:50 am to catch the early flight, a small breakfast box prepared for us the last day was definitely not worth the money ) and the breakfast they recommended us to have in their hotel was not only relatively expensive but also not tasteful at all! 
They also 'forgot' to replace many things in our room (coffee, tea, slippers...), I had to ask for the refill of coffee and tea. Even after I asked, they only refill the instant coffee but not the tea bags.
All in all, with this level of service, I wouldn't stay in there again or recommend to anyone.

reviews.title: poorly designed
reviews.text:
There's not much to praise to be honest.
Pro: the staff were friendly; swimming pool setting was cute; the floor to ceiling windows gave a large view of the streets from above.
Con: The breakfast food is sub-par (not hot enough, not much to choose from, and you can tell that some of the ingredients were used from the day before); the basement parking is nice, but you could not just use the elevator to go straight to your room floor, nor could you use the stairwell (odd); the executive suite room design was flawed in my opinion (3cm raised floor tiles that separate the stall, shower, sink, tub, and room were painful if you accidentally kick it, which seemed often for me, the refrigerator/water kettle should have been placed near the bathroom where water could be easily accessible; I like bathtub by the windows, but only if it's not looking at other hotel windows (no privacy), you can close the shade, but then what's the point of the tub by the windows :)   It's just a weird design for an executive suite.

In short, good location, great staff, just a poorly designed hotel room.

reviews.title: Nice hotel 1 block from the beach
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at the Liberty Central for 4 nights. There is a medium sized pool on level 4 and the beach is 1 block away. The room was nicely presented 
Cons: 1. Don’t book anything at the tour desk. The staff are disinterested and not helpful. 
2. The breakfast would be amazing if it was actually stocked. But on the 2nd day I realised why this was and it really surprised me - people loading up their bags with pasteries and cakes for later. I saw this happen regularly each day I was at breakfast. I even saw another tourist do a circle around the breakfast area to check that there were no staff present and grabbed a handful of fruits and pasteries. This is poorly policed and affects the rest of the tourists. I could couldn’t believe how greedy others can be.
3. Most signs are written in Russian (being the majority of tourists) it would be nice if more signage was in English 
I would recommend 2 nights at most in Nha Trang as a tourist from a western country

Cons: poor sound proofing, I could hear music coming from the street at night; carpets in lifts and lobby were dirty; hotel staff had varying levels of English, some had difficulty in understanding basic requests. 

The last thing I want to say is that there were large groups of Chinese tourists, it is not strictly speaking the hotel's fault, but if that bothers you then perhaps you should book a more upscale place to avoid those tour groups.

I chose to stay in the signature room with expectation to have direct and wide ocean view from the room; however the actual room turned out to located at  the corner of the hotel with only small PARTIAL view to the ocean. 
In addition, I was arranged to stay in the room on low floor so most of the view is to other buildings’ roof next door while the ocean view is limited. 
If you’d like a room with direct ocean view, Executive Ocean View is recommended since it is located at the front side of the hotel. Price of this type is also much cheaper.

reviews.title: Классный, но немного уставший отель в центре Нячанга
reviews.positives:
В целом отель оставил положительные впечатления. Персонал всегда готов ответить на вопросы, бассейн чистый, всегда пустой тренажерный зал и очень качественный массаж.
Но есть и несколько минусов. Я бронировала самый дорогой двухкомнатный люкс и попросила на рецепшн дополнительное одеяло. Люблю спать с мужем под разными одеялами. Мне его не предоставили, в отеле нет дополнительных одеял. Интересный факт, такое впервые в моей практике, всегда и везде для меня находилось одеяло. Так же с нами жил сын и ни разу за отдых на него не положили третье полотенце. Завтраки сервируют в основном под ребят, привыкших к азиатской кухне. Европейской еды очень и очень мало:яичница, тосты, хлопья и фрукты с овощами. В холле на 22 этаже постоянно был грязный ковер, кажется, его никто и никогда не пылесосил. Мини-бар в номере люкс был недоукомплектован, мне вроде и не нужно было это вино и пиво, но как-то впечатление подпортило. Свободных лежаков на пляже я не видела ни разу, из всего 12шт на весь отель.
Вроде бы все это мелочи, но из них складывается общее впечатление об отеле.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Системный отель который стремится к соответствию отеля 4 звезды. Номер соответствует фото при бронировании. Удобный и чистый номер с витражными большим окнами. Хорошая уборка комната. Отличный разнообразный завтрак. Понравился бассейн и спортивный зал при отели.
reviews.negatives: Отелю следует пересмотреть количество работников в вечернее время при приеме гостей в холле отеля. У меня перестала открываться электронной карточкой дверь номера, отсутствовал WiFi в отеле, и мне пришлось полтора часа ждать пока откроют дверь при этом я был свидетелем многочисленных конфликтов гостей отеля с работником отеля. Он просто один не справлялся со своей работой. Отдельная тема это бесплатные лежаки и зонтики на пляже. Бесплатных лежаков 12 и 6 зонтов на всех гостей отелей. При этом очень большой отель и лежаков не хватала на всех, приходилось вставать в 7 утра чтобы занять бесплатный лежак.  А из имеющих 12 лежаков, 2 были постоянно зарезервированы англоговорящей парой, а 2 продавались работником пляжа не гостям отеля. Отдельно следует упомянуть работника пляжа, такого недоброжелательного и отталкивающего отношения к гостям отеля с его стороны я не встречал на протяжении месяца своего путешествия по Вьетнаму.

In a nutshell, not deserving its 4-star hotel rating but acceptable level of service given the strategic location.

reviews.title: Not too bad
reviews.text: The hotel has an amazing staff, and all of them are very nice and helpful. However, I was trying to contact them the day before to ask to either refund my stay or save the credit and let me stay at a different time, and I was informed to call back the day when I was supposed to check in to reach out to the booking team. I have tried at least 3 calls for that day, and I was not able to talk to anyone, even the FO team, to talk about my unfortunate situation that prevented me from coming to this hotel to stay. I have stayed here before, and I really like the service and facilities with the price I paid for, but somehow the customer services team was unable to reach out yesterday, and no one was trying to reach out to us or give us a call about why we are not at the hotel to check in.

reviews.positives:
Прекрасный отель с удобным расположением и отличным сервисом
Останавливались в этом отеле и остались очень довольны. Из окна открывается шикарный вид, а отсутствие возможности открывать окна совсем не доставляло дискомфорта — в здании отличная вентиляция и прекрасно работает кондиционирование.

Очень порадовало, что у окна предусмотрена верёвка для сушки вещей — это действительно удобно. Отель находится в самом центре, рядом есть всё необходимое: магазины, кафе, туристические места.

Персонал всегда был вежлив и отзывчив. Номер оказался просторным, светлым, в нём было всё, что нужно: шампуни, средства личной гигиены, хорошо работающий холодильник. Остались только приятные впечатления.
reviews.negatives: Персонал на ресепшене, к сожалению, не всегда был достаточно любезен — хотелось бы больше приветливости и участия. Также, несмотря на довольно разнообразное меню на завтрак, блюда не всегда радовали вкусом.

The location was good, about a 3 minute walk to the beach and there is also a lovely swimming pool area, with bar/cafe at the hotel.

All in all we had a good stay.

reviews.text: Loved this Hotel, stayed 3 weeks here. Only thing is the internet is horrible. I could not work most days as it was too slow. They also had a rooftop restaurant and bar that was closed down. It looked fantastic looking from the beach to the top.  The hotel would have been 5-star top notch if they had these facilities open. The breakfast was good but had almost no western style food. Totally catered to Asian food choices.  As an American it would of been nice to have at least one or two choices but there was none. reviews.title: Good Location, great room & views
reviews.positives:
Our room was amazing. Lovely city view, from 17th floor, with windows all around. The bathtub in the window was just fantastic. The bed was large & comfortable. The room was of a very good size, plenty of storage. Shower always had hot water and was also a good size.

The room was clean, toilet paper & towels replenished.

Location was ideal, a short walk to the beach across the busy road. Shops, bars & restaurants all around. Small night market a short walk away.
reviews.negatives: Some of the reasons for booking this hotel was it's Private Beach & it's Sky Bar with views out across the city of Nha Trang.  Disappointed to find out on arrival that they no longer have their own part of the beach & that the Sky bar was permanently closed.  There were beds available to hire on the beach but obviously we hadn't come prepared with towels and therefore had to  purchase some and also had to pay 300 000 dong per day for 2 beds & umbrella. Not the end of the world but something we hadn't prepared for.  Breakfast was also disappointing. It was okay if you wanted aisian breakfast, but the day we went in, there was nothing "western" other than eggs, cereal, fruit, pastries & yogurt. Not saying that we wanted "western" but being a hotel that has international guests it should provide the option.

reviews.title: Great service from HOANG.
reviews.text: Pleasant stay at Liberty Central, great customer service from HOANG throughout our stay - he was always happy to help and quickly solved any issues we had - Excellent service from him. However we arrived early in the morning after a night bus but had to wait until 2pm to be able to check in. Booked a signature room, but were left disappointed as the blinds/curtains in the room did not close fully so bright light continued to stream into the room and especially when the sun came up. Also the room next to us had young children who were very loud as the walls were thin. Called reception and the staff immediately sent housekeeping upstairs to have a look and they offered to install new curtains or we could change rooms the following night. Changed rooms for the next two nights of our stay and was much better, quieter and the curtains worked well. Overall a good stay, made better by Hoang.

Breakfast buffet assortment large and caters for both western and traditional viet food. No chopsticks though.
reviews.negatives: You’ll be flanked by Russians. Ratio in the vacinity and hotel is 8 russians out of 10 people. If you want an authentic viet experience, this city ain’t it. The towel situation specially pertaining to the hotel is an issue. Whether is be on the private beach over the road or gym or pool deck. You’ll find them nowhere. Thankfully I’m an Aussie who can speak the language so I was able to get what I wanted but I can imagine if you speak only English, good luck mate.

reviews.title: The hotel is okay, located close to the beach.
reviews.text:
The hotel is well-located, right in the center and close to the beach, just a few minutes' walk to the swimming area. The surrounding area is also very convenient, with many convenience stores, coffee shops, and restaurants, making it easy to find places to eat.

The hotel has a spacious parking garage, friendly and enthusiastic security staff, always ready to assist when needed. However, the reception staff is not very friendly, with somewhat cold communication, which needs improvement to create a better impression with guests.

The room is clean, beautifully designed, with a very airy and nice sea view. The central air conditioning works well, cooling quickly and deeply, sometimes even a bit too cold. However, the wifi is unstable, with fluctuating signals, making it difficult to access, which is inconvenient when needing to work or relax.

Overall, this is a choice worth considering if you want to stay close to the beach and the center, just be mindful of the wifi quality and reception service.

reviews.title: Signature room is very nice, great location and good price. However the facilities are a bit old and there are areas of
reviews.positives: We had a signature room and it was very nice. Lovely views, amazing bed and bathtub looking over the city. Breakfast is ok. The location is perfect. When we arrived our room was “made and ready” but it had not been cleaned, we let the reception know and they fixed it immediately so they managed to save the situation haha (read below and see picture for information about cleanliness). Good price for the quality.
reviews.negatives:
When we arrived, it was obvious the floors had not been vacuumed. There was dirt in the corners, some dirty socks left by previous guests and hairs everywhere. The glass doors in the hotel room were also dirty. We took pictures and showed them to the reception which immediately apologised and ordered a deep clean of the room. When we got back, it was up to standards and we were happy. However, during our entire stay, we could see the same rubbish in the corridor every day which meant they were not vacuumed or cleaned. It was quite dirty and never got taken care of, but since it was not in our room, we didn’t really care… however this isn’t something you would expect from a four star hotel. 

Some of the machines in the gym are broken, very old. There are only a few sunbeds by the pool area. The bar by the pool was closed as well as the sky bar which was quite shocking, and there was no information written about this. The hotel has a private beach with sunbeds and we were lucky the first days to get a couple. But the other days it was impossible since there were only a few. The staff never greeted us when we entered the hotel, they didn’t even look up. We got the impression that they have dealt with rude guests of a long period of time so we can’t really blame them.

I have mentioned honest floors about the hotel, but I do have to mention we were very happy with our room once it had been cleaned we felt comfortable and the price is really good. So it’s still very recommended.

reviews.title: Hotel in a centralise area
reviews.text:
Very nice hotel for the price you are paying. The ocean view is not the best since the hotel is not along the beach but not too bad either. They have private sun bench for hotel guests, I didn't use it but it should be on a first come first serve basis.
The executive lounge is quite nice with food and drinks, and you have a nice view of the surrounding area.
The room is quite spacious but I do find it weird that the shower and bath tub is not enclosed. Like taking a shower in the air-con room.
Convenient to book airport transfer from the hotel to the airport.

reviews.title: Great but could be better
reviews.text: We had a very nice stay until when we checked out and they charged us for the laundry bag. Not the laundry service! We didn't use the laundry service but took the laundry bag because we went to the mud bath spa and resorts and our clothes were wet. We've been staying in so many hotels (including 5 stars) and laundry bags are free to take. They could have simply mentioned in  the list of fee in the room. The staff handled the situation poorly, he just kept saying that it's an amenity so they have to charge it. It sounds ridiculous! Some staff are nice but a few staff need more training on their customer service, especially attitude when dealing with difficult situation. I work as Front Desk Supervisor and I'm usually super easy because I know they have to deal with everyday, but that one staff attitude was just very unprofessional!!!

HOWEVER, I SUGGEST THE HOTEL RETRAIN THE RECEPTIONIST NAMED CONG ON HOW TO BEHAVE WITH CUSTOMERS AS THEY WERE DISRESPECTFUL AND DISREGARDED CUSTOMER RIGHTS - READY TO HANG UP ON CUSTOMERS WHEN THEY HAVE FEEDBACK. SPECIFICALLY, THE TOILET IN MY ROOM WAS BROKEN, SO THE TECHNICIAN SUGGESTED TO THE RECEPTIONIST TO CHANGE ROOMS. I CONTACTED THE RECEPTIONIST TO ASK HOW THEY WOULD HANDLE IT, BUT THERE WAS NOT A SINGLE APOLOGY FOR THE INCONVENIENCE I HAD TO MOVE TO ANOTHER ROOM, AND THE ATTITUDE WAS ARROGANT, SPEAKING IMPOLITELY WHEN I HAD NOT FINISHED SPEAKING AND HUNG UP. I CALLED BACK A SECOND TIME TO ADJUST THE ATTITUDE, AND RECEIVED A HARSH RESPONSE AS IF IN THE CUSTOMER'S FACE. 

AS IF THAT WASN'T ENOUGH: WHEN I WENT TO CHANGE ROOMS, I HAD TO GATHER MY BELONGINGS - THE SAME RECEPTIONIST STOOD AND WATCHED WHILE I HAD TO CARRY MY STUFF - THE ARROGANT ATTITUDE OF THIS RECEPTIONIST IS NOT WORTHY OF WORKING IN THE SERVICE INDUSTRY, ESPECIALLY IN HOTEL SERVICE - WHERE THEY HAVE DAILY CONTACT WITH CUSTOMERS. 

HOW CAN IT BE THAT A HOTEL SHOULD DISTURB CUSTOMERS WHEN THEY ARE STAYING AND HAVE TO MOVE TO ANOTHER ROOM WITHOUT RECEIVING A SINGLE APOLOGY - BUT STILL HAVE TO ENDURE THE POOR ATTITUDE OF THE RECEPTIONIST LIKE THAT. I SUGGEST THE HOTEL HANDLE THIS THOROUGHLY. I PAY TO STAY, SO I EXPECT TO RECEIVE GOOD SERVICE - I AM NOT ASKING FOR A FAVOR!!!
